7576669628294810911.text: Wait until the leaves fall. Or most. Then the sap won’t be actively flowing. Then that’s the time to prune away! That’s a beautiful tree me new friend!💚💚💚
7576669628294810911.author: bonsai_loveyou

7576669628294810911.text: OK, I feel like I was too broad on my explanation so I came back! I’m still learning, but from what I know and have learned from others who know a lot more than me… is that maples can tolerate pruning once they are asleep and the sap isn’t moving… but “Heavy” pruning should be done closer to the end of winter
7576669628294810911.author: bonsai_loveyou
